This is your Quick Launch Planner. Now, the Quick Launch ... I love it,
because it's a great way to get momentum into your business or get a quick cash infusion.
The seeds of this is: a couple times early on in my business where I had an unexpected
financial event come up where I needed to raise some money quickly to pay for
something. Through sort of a little bit of desperation, I came up with this idea for Quick
Launch, and it worked really, really well. And this is something ... You're not going to
want to do this every single month. Probably not every other month, but you could do it
once or twice a year and bring in a lot of money really quickly.
The first time I showed this to someone, she ended up having the best month
she'd ever had in her business by a factor of probably five. It was just doing a super quick
launch that took, really, no extra work other than some email copy, and the results were
five times better than the best month she had ever had. It can be pretty amazing, and it's
super simple. It's super quick. You don't need to shoot any videos. You don't need to
create a new product. It's just fantastic.
Now, the thing that you do need is you need an email list. Different launches fit
for different situations. This is one example where you do need to have an email list, and
you need to have offer. And basically, what you're going to do is you're going to take that
offer, and you're going to make it a better offer. You're going to add an extra bonus. It
could just be an extra webinar or tele-seminar that goes along with it. It could be a
special video or a PDF report, or it could just be a discount. Or it could be a combination
of any one of those.
What you're doing is you're creating a special offer, a special time-limited offer,
and then you're telling people about it via email. And it really can be that simple. Focus
on keeping it simple. Just create something super compelling. It's either a discount or
some extra bonus. And by the way, you can do this for an affiliate product, as well. You
can put together a Quick Launch for something that you're selling as an affiliate where
you just add some extra bonuses. You put together an extra bonus package and say, "You
have to buy this product in such and such a period of time, and you'll get these extra
bonuses."
You have to decide on what your offer is going to be, what the special offer is
going to be. Then, you need a story to go along with this. The first time I did this, I
needed to raise money to pay my taxes. I had a really good year in my business. I didn't
realize how good the year was, and then, when it was time to pay taxes, I went in, had my
guy prepare the taxes for me. He gave me the tax bill, and it was huge. It was 10s of
thousands of dollars higher than I expected, and I was just shocked. I guess I should've
planned a little better, but I was just shocked. I was like, "Oh my gosh. I don't want to
just have to write a check for this. I want to make some money to pay for this."
And so I put together a Quick Launch, and the story was exactly the story I just
told you, that I messed up my taxes and I need to raise some money, so I've put together
this really crazy deal for you. It's what we call reason why copy. You're putting together a
special deal for them, and you have a reason why. It could be something really simple,
like, "I just want to do a customer appreciation. I just want to ... I'm so happy to have this

business and I'm so happy to have you as a customer, I just put together this special
customer appreciation bonus offer."
You could do something like that, but it's better to wrap it around some type of a
story. It could be a wedding, a birthday, a graduation, a tax bill, a new office, a new home
... You need a new driveway. Your pipes burst. It could be any number of things, just
something you can loosely tie to being a reason for a promotion. And it's really that
simple. And then, you just put together your launch. I've got copy, some past copy I've
used. Use that for inspiration, and then you'll launch. It's that simple, and this is your
Quick Launch planner to watch you through the entire process.
